Class HudManager

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
public class HudManager extends Object
HudManager is responsible for managing and displaying the game's heads-up display (HUD). It shows various visual elements such as health, ammo, weapon selection boxes, pause menu, and interaction prompts.

  • Field Details

    • labels

      public ArrayList<javafx.scene.Node> labels

    • menus

      public ArrayList<javafx.scene.Node> menus

    • weaponBoxes

      public ArrayList<javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle> weaponBoxes

    • weaponIcons

      public ArrayList<javafx.scene.image.ImageView> weaponIcons

  • Constructor Details

    • HudManager

      public HudManager(Player player)
      Constructs the HUD manager and initializes the HUD elements.

      Sets up labels for health, ammo, interaction hints, weapon boxes, weapon icons, and initializes the pause menu.

      Parameters:
      player - the player entity whose information will be displayed on the HUD.

  • Method Details

    • updateHP

      public void updateHP(int hp)

    • updateKeyTip

      public void updateKeyTip()
      Shows interaction String when near Interactable

    • reloadingText

      public void reloadingText()
      Shows reloading text

    • updateAmmoLabel

      public void updateAmmoLabel()
      Updates the ammo label

    • changeSelectedWeaponBox

      public void changeSelectedWeaponBox(int boxNumber)
      Changes the fill color of the selected weapon box.
      Parameters:
      boxNumber - the index of the weapon box to highlight.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if an invalid box number is provided.

    • setWeaponBoxDefault

      public void setWeaponBoxDefault(int boxNumber)
      Resets the weapon box color to its default state (white).
      Parameters:
      boxNumber - the index of the weapon box to reset.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if an invalid box number is provided.

    • setNewIcon

      public void setNewIcon(int boxIconNumber, String iconTexture)
      Updates the weapon icon for a specified weapon box.
      Parameters:
      boxIconNumber - the index of the weapon icon to update.
      iconTexture - the texture identifier for the new icon image.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if an invalid icon index is provided.

    • setPauseMenuVisible

      public void setPauseMenuVisible()
      Makes the pause menu visible.

    • setPauseMenuInvisible

      public void setPauseMenuInvisible()
      Hides the pause menu.

    • clearHud

      public void clearHud()
      Clears the HUD by making all HUD elements invisible.

      Uses Platform.runLater to ensure the UI modification happens on the JavaFX Application Thread.
